options.content:
Miner Intelligence Report

Search any Bitcoin SHA-256 miner model from the Intelligence Catalog (235+ models indexed)

💡 Use the Search Miner Model box above — type a slug like antminer-s21, whatsminer-m63s-plus, or teraflux-ah3880
Popular: S19J Pro S21 S21 Immersion M63S+ M66S+ AH3880 Avalon A15 XP SealMiner A3 Pro

Mining Guardian Intelligence Catalog — 165 tables • 235+ miner models • 10+ manufacturers
Data sources: Manufacturer specs, community reports, fleet telemetry, AI analysis (Qwen 32B)

current.text: Bitmain Antminer S19j Pro (92 TH) (92 TH/s)
